invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破3100（基于ATR 15.27和近期支撑上移）或融资费率Z-Score超过70%（显示过度拥挤多头），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 3100 (based on ATR 15.27 and raised recent support) or funding rate Z-Score exceeds 70% (indicating overly crowded longs).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破125（基于ATR和近期低点）或融资费率Z-Score超过80%（显示过度拥挤多头），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 125 (based on ATR and recent lows) or funding rate Z-Score exceeds 80% (indicating overly crowded longs).
